description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:20.04 Docker image and two stages: build and test. In the build stage define a build_job that runs a before_script installing make, build-essential and automake via apt-get, then executes the script commands `pwd; cd ./src;` and `make seed`, and publishes the generated bin/ directory as an artifact that expires after 20 minutes. In the test stage add a test_cases job that runs a series of commands to change into each test case directory under test_cases/... , executes `../../../bin/seed_4 seed.inp >& log` for each, and returns to the root, and stores the log and outputs directories from each case as artifacts. No additional services, caches, or deployment targets are defined.
